gigapan.name: Berkeley, under University Avenue  (bay_day_8)
gigapan.description:
Night shot under University Ave at 4th Ave, Berkeley.  Brennan's restaurant and bar on the left, Spenger's Grotto on the right.

Used a 3 second self timer, so camera jitter would settle down, and a 1.6 second exposure.  

I (finally!) turned off image stabilization, and I think that makes a different. 

I also spent time fiddling with the white balance.  I had a calibration target with me, but I ended up taking some test shots and looking at them in the display and decided that 'Daylight Fluorescent' was the effect I liked.

 

40 images
f 3.2
1.6 second exposure
iso 200
Focal Length: 59mm 


I put the gigapan into manual mode and hand triggered each exposure.
